sentence_reviews.text: Only selected experts or branches process each input, increasing capacity without proportional per-token compute.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports broad neural-network, gating, and mixture-model background, but not modern sparse MoE scaling claims directly.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition is plausible for sparse MoE and conditional computation, but the cited packet source is too broad for direct verification.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts is to connect Gating & multiplicative control, Affine transforms & dense layers to downstream capabilities including Mixture-of-experts models, Adaptive depth, early exit & token skipping, Mixture-of-Depths.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited packet source supports gating and dense-layer background but not the complete downstream list.
sentence_reviews.notes: MoE is supported by synthesis; adaptive depth and Mixture-of-Depths need more specific sources.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning provides broad mixture/gating background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The relationship is definitional for MoE, but direct verification would require a mixture-of-experts source.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Adaptive depth, early exit & token skipping
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited source does not directly establish adaptive-depth, early-exit, or token-skipping mechanisms.
sentence_reviews.notes: Conditional computation is relevant, but this example needs a targeted adaptive computation citation.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited packet source predates and does not directly support Mixture-of-Depths.
sentence_reviews.notes: A Mixture-of-Depths or conditional-computation source is needed.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Gating & multiplicative control, Affine transforms & dense layers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports broad component background but not the generic workload/hardware limitation.
sentence_reviews.notes: The dependency list is plausible; the limitation claim needs more direct support.

sentence_reviews.text: Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Gating & multiplicative control.
sentence_reviews.notes: Gating is central to routing and MoE-style conditional computation.

sentence_reviews.text: Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports dense/affine neural-network components.
sentence_reviews.notes: Experts are commonly implemented as dense neural submodules, but the packet source is not MoE-specific.

sentence_reviews.text: Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts uses Distributed systems & networking as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The packet sources provide only broad computation background, not direct distributed-MoE evidence.
sentence_reviews.notes: Distributed systems are common for large MoE implementations, but not intrinsic to the defined operation.

edge_reviews.notes: Gating is a core routing mechanism; relationship and strength are defensible.
Dense expert submodules are common; relationship and core strength are defensible but not directly proven by the packet source.
Distributed systems support large MoE deployments, but the edge is implementation-dependent rather than clearly part of the mechanism.
